name: Tasty Pineapple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and 2 tablespoons sugar substitute until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, and salt.
4. Alternately add the milk to the dry ingredients, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Beat at low speed after each addition.
5. Fold in pineapple pieces that have been cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
6. Pour batter into a 6-cup Bundt pan or heavy ring mold coated with vegetable cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Combine remaining pineapple juice and sugar substitute; stir until the sugar substitute dissolves.
9. Remove cake from oven and pour juice over the cake while it is still hot. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 129
CHO: 46mg
CAR: 17gm
PRO: 3gm
FAT: 5gm
SOD: 341
